data.text: P04/07 FELISIAN WITH A TENUOUS DULL DEBRIS RING. AT 164.55 IT
WAS ON A HILLSIDE AND AT 62.62 IT WAS ROLLING GROUND, BUT BOTH
HADTALL BROWN GRASS AND BUSHES WITH TREES AND NOT MUCH ELSE. AT
99.117 THOUGH THE SOMEWHAT HILLY ROLLING GROUND WAS COLD AND
BARREN, THERE WERE THREE DISTINCT PINNACLES; THE SHORTER OF THE
THREE LOCATED AT -17.57; THE WIDEST AT -68.28; THE CLLOSEST TO
THE LANDING SITE AT 26.-14 APPEARS FROM A DISTANCE TO BE TWO
SEPARATE ITEMS BUT IT IS AN ILLUSION WHERE THE OBJECTS ARE
JOINED AT 14.-29; ALL OF THE OBJECTS HAVE NEARBY LARGE ICE PONDS
IN DEPRESSIONS IN THE GROUND; HOPPEERS HERE ARE VERY EAGER TO
ASSIST INVESTIGATION OF THE OBJECTS- IF ONLY THEY COULD BE
TRAINED ACT AS PORTERS THEY COULD CARRY THE GROG SUPPLIES. PRO
